Few facts for those who don't know:

1✎||His full name is Cloudy Rainfall, although he doesn't particularly like official communication.

2✎||He's a pretty emotional boy and can electrocute you if you make him very angry, although he's more likely to cry and remember it for a long time..

3✎||In a relationship, he will be more of a sweet and caring housewife and is ready Kissing your heels in truest sense of the word.(Henpecked in one word)

4✎||He's very soft & warm, like teddy bear :D

5✎||He's quite tactile and likes hugs.
